trad1: For the rattling valour of future centuries,
trad2: In the name of the higher tribes of the future,
trad3: For  the  thundering  glory  of  ages  to  come

trad1: For the highborn tribe of people,
trad2: in the name of their foreboding nobility,
trad3: for  the  tall  race  of  men

Verso Ruso (Original): Я лишился и чаши на пире отцов,
trad1: I am deprived of the cups on the pyres of my fathers,
trad2: I have had to give up my drinking cup at the family feast,
trad3: I  have  given  up  both  the  cup  at  my  fathers’  feast

trad1: Of their pleasures, of their marks of esteem.
trad2: my joy too, then my honor.

trad1: Like a wolfhound the century leaps on my shoulders,
trad2: This cutthroat wolf century has jumped on my shoulders,
trad3: The  wolf-fanged  age  hurls  itself  at  my  shoulders

Verso Ruso (Original): Но не волк я по крови своей -
trad1: But my skin is not the skin of a wolf.
trad2: but I don’t wear the hide of a wolf —
trad3: but  I  am  no  wolf  by  my  blood,

Verso Ruso (Original): Запихай меня лучше, как шапку в рукав
trad1: Stuff me rather like a cap into the sleeve
trad2: no, tuck me like a cap in the sleeve
trad3: rather  stuff  me  like  a  hat  in  the  sleeve

trad1: Of a yellow sheepskin coat from Siberian steppes —
trad2: of a sheepskin shipped to the steppes.
trad3: of  the  Siberian  steppes’  warm  overcoat

Verso Ruso (Original): Чтоб не видеть ни труса, ни хлипкой грязцы,
trad1: So that I see neither cowards, nor shallow dirt,
trad2: I do not want to eat the small dirt of the coward,
trad3: that  I  may  not  see  the  coward,  the  soft  bits  of  flesh,

trad1: Nor the bloody bones on the wheel,
trad2: or wait for the bones to crack on the wheel.
trad3: nor  the  bloody  bones  in  the  wheel,

Verso Ruso (Original): Чтоб сияли всю ночь голубые песцы
trad1: So that the blue foxes in their primitive beauty
trad2: I want to run with the shiny blue foxes
trad3: that  all  night  the  blue  polar  foxes  may  shine

trad1: All night long may shine at me.
trad2: moving like dancers in the night.
trad3: to  me  in  their  primal  beauty.

Verso Ruso (Original): Уведи меня в ночь, где течет Енисей
trad1: Carry me off into the night where the Yenisei flows,
trad2: There the Siberian river is glass,
trad3: Take  me  away  into  the  night  where  the  Yenisei  flows

trad1: Where a pine tree reaches up to a star,
trad2: there the fir tree touches a star,
trad3: and  the  pines  grow  to  the  stars,

Verso Ruso (Original): Потому что не волк я по крови своей
trad1: For my skin is not the skin of a wolf
trad2: because I don’t have the hide of a wolf
trad3: because  I  am  no  wolf  by  my  blood

trad1: And my mouth is not twisted with falsehood.
trad2: or slaver in the wolf trap’s steel jaw.
trad3: and  only  my  equal  will  kill  me.
